fields.question: Which location are you applying for?
Will you require a reasonable accommodation to complete the hiring process which may include technical testing, virtual and in-person style interviews?
This position must be based out of our LA or NYC office locations. What describes your situation?
options: Yes, I am currently near one of these offices
No, I would need to relocate
I would need to work from home

If you currently have nonimmigrant status, for example F-1 or H-1, your answer to this question should be "yes."
I identify my ethnicity as

South Asian (Bangladeshi, Bhutanese, Indian, Nepali, Pakistani, Sri Lankan)
Southeast Asian (Burmese, Cambodian, Filipino, Hmong, Indonesia, Laotian, Malaysian, Mien, Singaporean, Thai, Vietnamese)
Bi-Racial/Mixed Race - Having 2 or more racial/ethnic groups
